name: Settings: Libraries: Remove library
fullName: Manage Libraries: Settings: Libraries: Remove library

steps.name: When  I add "LYRASIS Reads" account from welcomeScreen
And  I switch to 'LYRASIS Reads' from side menu
Then  Account 'Palace Bookshelf' is not present on Accounts screen
